introduce.title: What is AI Barber Hairstyle Changer?
introduce.label: Introduction
introduce.description: AI Barber is a cutting-edge virtual hairstyle tool that uses advanced artificial intelligence to help you find your perfect look without visiting a salon.

items.title: Virtual Hairstyle Try-On
items.description: Try on countless virtual hairstyles including Buzz Cut, Bob, Mullet, and Pixie cuts instantly.

items.title: Realistic AI Results
items.description: Our AI Haircut Changer generates highly realistic results that respect your face shape and hair texture.

items.title: Hair Color Changer
items.description: Experiment with different hair colors from Balayage to Copper and Silver with our hair color filter.

items.title: Style Transfer
items.description: Transfer styles from celebrities or models directly to your photo using our image-to-image technology.

benefits.title: Why Choose Our AI Hairstyle Changer
benefits.label: Benefits
benefits.description: Explore infinite possibilities with our secure, fast, and user-friendly AI hair simulator.

items.title: Lightning Fast & 100% Online
items.description: Transform your hair in seconds. No software to download, no waiting days for results. Works directly in your browser.

items.title: Privacy First
items.description: Your photos are processed securely and deleted automatically. We value your privacy and never use your images for training without permission.

items.title: Professional Quality
items.description: Get salon-quality visualizations that help you communicate exactly what you want to your barber or stylist.

usage.title: How to Use AI Hairstyle Changer
usage.description: Get your new look in three simple steps with our intuitive interface:

items.title: Upload Your Photo
items.description: Upload a clear, front-facing photo of yourself for the best transformation results.

items.title: Select Hairstyle
items.description: Browse our catalog and select a hairstyle from preset categories like Men, Women, or Kids.

items.title: Describe Your Look
items.description: Input a description of your desired or imagined hairstyle to customize the result further.

items.title: Generate & Download
items.description: Click generate to see the magic happen, then download your favorite new looks.

features.title: Key Features of AI Barber
features.description: Everything you need for a complete virtual makeover.

items.title: 200+ Trendy Hairstyles
items.description: Access a massive library of hairstyles including Buzz Cut, Pompadour, Bob, Pixie, and more.

items.title: Smart Face Detection
items.description: Automatically detects face shape to ensure hairstyles fit perfectly.

items.title: Color Experimentation
items.description: Try out new hair colors without the chemical damage risk.

items.title: High Resolution Downloads
items.description: Download clear, high-quality images perfect for sharing.

items.title: Style Comparison
items.description: Compare before and after looks side-by-side to make the best decision.

items.title: Mobile Friendly
items.description: Use AI Barber on any device, anywhere. Optimized for mobile experience.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Got questions about our AI Hairstyle Changer? We've got answers.
faq.tip: Can't find what you're looking for? Contact our support team

items.question: Is this AI Hairstyle Changer free to use?
items.answer: Yes, AI Barber offers a free trial for new users to try our AI hairstyle changer. You can generate several hairstyles to see the quality of our tool.

items.question: How realistic are the hairstyles?
items.answer: Our advanced AI models are trained on millions of high-quality images to ensure the hairstyles blend naturally with your original photo, matching lighting and angles for a photorealistic look.

items.question: What kind of photos work best?
items.answer: For the best results, upload a clear, front-facing photo with good lighting. Avoid photos where your face is covered by sunglasses, masks, or excessive hair. A neutral expression works best.

items.question: Can I change hair color only?
items.answer: Yes! You can use our tool to specifically test different hair colors while keeping your current style, or change both style and color simultaneously.

items.question: Does it work for men and women?
items.answer: Absolutely. We have extensive catalogs for men's hairstyles (Buzz cut, Crew cut, Fade, etc.) and women's hairstyles (Bob, Layered, Pixie, etc.), as well as styles for kids.

items.question: Is my photo data secure?
items.answer: We take privacy seriously. Your uploaded photos are processed securely for the generation purpose and are not stored permanently or shared with third parties.

cta.title: Ready for a New Look?

photoGuidelines.title: Photo Guidelines for Best Results
photoGuidelines.suitableDescription: Please upload a clear, front-facing photo of your face. To create a satisfying look, it's ideal to pull your hair up or back. And let your hair hang naturally.
photoGuidelines.unsuitableDescription: Please don't upload photos taken from the side, in low light, where your face is covered by hair or any other objects. Also, please avoid cartoon images.
